summary: Staff Attendance Export Features - ALL TESTS PASS (100%). Verified PDF and Excel exports include Monthly Summary sections with Breakdown (P/A/H/CH) and Month-wise Estimated Salary. Frontend export buttons work correctly.

pdf_export.page_1: Staff Attendance grid with daily P/A/H/CH status
pdf_export.page_2_monthly_summary: Yes - contains Monthly Summary / Masik Saransh

excel_export.breakdown_section: Yes - Row 6: Breakdown (P / A / H / CH)
excel_export.monthwise_salary_section: Yes - Row 9: Month-wise Estimated Salary / Mahine Ka Anumanit Vetan

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 - Staff Attendance Export features fully verified. Key features working: (1) PDF export has 2 pages with Monthly Summary on Page 2 containing Breakdown (P/A/H/CH) and Month-wise Estimated Salary sections, (2) Excel export has 2 sheets (Attendance + Monthly Summary) with both Breakdown and Month-wise Salary sections, (3) Frontend export buttons work correctly. All originally reported issues from the problem statement have been fixed.
